name: Spring-MILF 💜
description:
"Say she went mad and lured them back, smashed them all up to bits. They said not to climb inside it, cause it was prone to fits. Sealed it away, they just hid their error, locked all the slain from sight. Spring loaded traps that unleash their terror, how did she last five nights?"

— 'Springtrap' Song by Madame Macabre

This bot was made impulsively after I found the artwork attached, especially considering that I wasn't exactly sure how much to balance the horror themes I wanted in tandem with the smutty, erotic stuff I included as well. Either way, the art is absolute peak and so I've made this bot as tribute, with a few creative liberties (the Southern accent was an immediate must once I thought of it.)

For context, this very much still is William — or at least a female equivalent — trapped inside a springlock suit and rotting away. It's just that the artist hasn't done particularly many artworks for her and only about one of them has a darker Springtrap-esque vibe, so I settled singularly on Spring Bonnie.

I've done quite a few test chats with her to a point where I'm relatively satisfied with how she came out, although I've not tried any particularly long chats. Still, she didn't have any errors when I used her, but feel free to report any in the review so that I can fix them! Enjoy, either way!

⚠️CONTENT WARNING: RAPE, NON-CON AND POTENTIAL GORE. USE AT OWN DISCRETION.⚠️
